style: <style>#postBody{font-size:18px;line-height:1.9;max-width:860px}#postBody h1,#postBody h2,#postBody h3,#postBody h4{color:#0969da;border-left:4px solid #0969da;padding-left:10px}#postBody a{color:#8250df;text-decoration:none}#postBody a:hover{text-decoration:underline}#postBody img{display:block;margin:0 auto;max-width:100%;border-radius:8px}#postBody pre{background:#f6f8fa;border-radius:10px;padding:16px;overflow-x:auto}#postBody code{background:#f0f0f0;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.9em}#postBody pre code{background:none;padding:0}#postBody blockquote{border-left:4px solid #8250df;background:#f8f0ff;margin:1rem 0;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;color:#555}#postBody hr{border:none;border-top:2px dashed #0969da44;margin:2rem 0}#postBody table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden}#postBody table th{background:#0969da;color:#fff;padding:10px 14px;text-align:left}#postBody table td{padding:9px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid #eee}#postBody table tr:hover td{background:#f0f6ff}#postBody table tr:nth-child(even) td{background:#f6f8fa}.avatar{cursor:pointer;animation:avatar-glow 2s infinite!important;transform:none!important}@keyframes avatar-glow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px 2px rgba(9,105,218,0.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 18px 6px rgba(130,80,223,0.4)}}@media print{.Header,button,canvas{display:none!important}#postBody{max-width:100%}}@media(max-width:768px){#postBody{font-size:16px}#postBody table{display:block;overflow-x:auto}}</style>
indexScript:
<script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){
var av=document.querySelector('.avatar');
if(av){av.style.cursor='pointer';av.onclick=function(){window.open('https://github.com/luliy6')}}
var items=document.querySelectorAll('.post-item');
items.forEach(function(el,i){el.style.animationDelay=(i*0.07)+'s'});
var el=document.querySelector('.blogTitle p')||document.querySelector('p.f4');
if(el){var txt=el.textContent;el.textContent='';var i=0;(function type(){if(i<txt.length){el.textContent+=txt[i++];setTimeout(type,60)}})()}
var h=new Date().getHours();
var greet=h<6?'夜深了，注意休息':h<12?'早上好！':h<14?'中午好！':h<18?'下午好！':'晚上好！';
var gtag=document.createElement('div');gtag.textContent=greet+' 欢迎来到 Luliy\'s Blog';gtag.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-bottom:8px';
var wrap=document.querySelector('.container-lg')||document.body;wrap.insertBefore(gtag,wrap.firstChild);
var rndBtn=document.createElement('button');rndBtn.textContent='随机文章';rndBtn.style.cssText='display:block;margin:8px auto;padding:6px 18px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid #0969da;background:transparent;color:#0969da;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px';rndBtn.onclick=function(){fetch('/postList.json').then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(posts){if(posts.length){var p=posts[Math.floor(Math.random()*posts.length)];location.href=p.link}})};wrap.insertBefore(rndBtn,gtag.nextSibling);
document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='ArrowLeft')history.back();if(e.key==='ArrowRight')history.forward()});
var clock=document.createElement('div');clock.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:#aaa;margin-bottom:4px';wrap.insertBefore(clock,gtag);setInterval(function(){var now=new Date();clock.textContent=now.toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN')},1000);
});</script>
indexStyle: <style>.post-item{transition:box-shadow 0.2s,transform 0.2s;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;border-left:3px solid transparent}.post-item:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);transform:translateY(-2px);border-left-color:#0969da}.footer{text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #eee}@keyframes fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.post-item{animation:fadeInUp 0.5s ease both}.color-fg-muted.mt-2{display:none}@keyframes avatar-glow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px 2px rgba(9,105,218,0.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 18px 6px rgba(130,80,223,0.4)}}@keyframes rainbow{0%{background-position:0%}100%{background-position:300%}}</style>
title: Luliy
subTitle: 我将无限进步!

P8.description:
UPDATES: 

补充一篇 24 年初的文章，分享最近一年的一些个人实践：[养生博主的 23 年总结](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/675470252)。

P6.description:
# 英语
## CET4
<details>
<summary>CET pro</summary>

```
 Role: The Syntax Deep Dive Master
## Profile & Objective
You are a Senior English Teacher and Language Analyst with over 20 years of experience. Your pedagogical approach focuses on patience, systematic breakdown, and structural logic.
**Your Goal:** To deconstruct complex English syntactic structures (S-V-O, clauses, modification chains) for beginners/intermediate learners. You do not just translate; you help the student **internalize the logic** of the language.
## Core Execution Framework
The user will provide learning material (a single sentence or a full article/paragraph). You must **automatically and strictly** execute one of the following two modes based on the input.
### Mode 1: Single Sentence Deep Dive
**Trigger:** User inputs a single sentence.
**Execution:** You must follow these phases sequentially.
#### Phase 1: Morphological Segmentation (Table Driven)
1. 	**Deconstruct:** Break the sentence down into its smallest meaningful units (morphemes, words, or key phrases).
2. 	**Format:** Present these units in a **Markdown Table**.
3. 	**Pre-requisite Check:** After displaying the table, you must immediately ask: '请您确认，表格中的所有词素/短语您是否都已完全理解？请回复‘是’或‘否’，以便我们继续。
